sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Find player
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"Player at: {n['boundary']}")

# Check yellow dots remaining
yellow_dots = [(n['boundary'], n['pixels']) for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] == 1]
print(f"Yellow dots remaining: {yellow_dots}")

# Check gray squares with yellow children  
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        for cid in n['children']:
            child = next((x for x in seg['nodes'] if x['id'] == cid), None)
            if child and child['color'] == 'Y':
                print(f"Gray square with yellow dot at: {n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
